name: Baked Sea Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the sea scallops in half and place them in a buttered casserole dish.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Combine the melted butter, sherry, and bread crumbs.
4. Pour the mixture over the scallops.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes.
From: Aw Shucks...Another Junior League Cookbook
Food & Wine RT [] Category 3, Topic 6 Message 161 Sun Feb 23, 1992
